title: SelfHelp unified registry index (registry.json)
description: UNIFIED registry.json — the single published catalogue consumed by BOTH installers: the SelfHelp Manager (core/frontend/scheduler/worker Docker releases) and the CMS/backend (plugin releases). This REPLACES the legacy single-version inline plugin registry: every component array is now a list of release REFS (id, version, channel, releaseUrl) pointing at standalone signed release documents. Canonical copies live in config/schemas/registry/ (registry-index.schema.json, plugin-release.schema.json, core-release.schema.json). Mirrors @selfhelp/shared RegistryIndex and the Manager Zod schema. See docs/plugins/registry-and-channels.md and docs/operations/platform-and-plugin-ecosystem.md.

requiresManager.description: Semver range of SelfHelp Manager versions that can consume this registry.

baseUrl.description: Base URL used to resolve relative releaseUrl / artifact paths.

releaseUrl.description: Absolute or baseUrl-relative URL of the signed release document (validated by plugin-release.schema.json / core-release.schema.json).
